content: لِغَايَةِ يَوْمَيْنِ فَاتَتْ اَلْجَوُّ كَانَ جَمِيلًا
translations: eng:until two days ago, the weather was pleasant

transcriptions.arabizi: lighaeyit yoomeen fatu ilgaww kaen gameel
